ItacPersonItem.Notes: Portrait of Angelo Grillo from Le Glorie degli Incogniti, Venice, 1647. Also member of Insensati of Perugia, Addormentati of Genova, Giustiniani of Padova, Affidati of Pavia.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
